title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates building a Jira adapter for Archon, enabling automated AI-driven bug fixing workflows triggered from Jira tickets. The system creates a dedicated conversation context per ticket, generates fixes, opens pull requests, and updates tickets with results across GitHub, Slack, Telegram, Discord, and Jira.
